message.content:
### Colors (Hex)  
- `--color-brand-primary`: `#FFE01B` (Cavendish Yellow)  
- `--color-ink`: `#241C15` (Peppercorn)  
- `--color-bg-cream`: `#FEDE9`  
- `--color-bg-white`: `#FFFFFF`  
- `--color-accent-green`: `#2D4F35`  
- `--color-accent-peach`: `#F4C9A4`  
- `--color-accent-blue`: `#1B3358`  
- `--color-accent-red`: `#C8442E`  


### Typography  
#### Display / Headline Typeface  
- Name: "Means" (custom, by Commercial Type)  
- Description: Elegant serif with quirky warmth; rounded corners, editorial tone, light-weight by default.  
- Usage: Light font-weight, large sizes; for H1/H2/hero headlines only (generous letter-spacing, never for long body copy).  
- Free equivalents:  
  - "Fraunces" (Google Fonts) — closest free equivalent (variable, rounded/soft serif quality).  
  - "Lora" / "Noto Serif" — light weight as a safer fallback.  

#### Body / UI Typeface  
- Name: "Graphik"  
- Description: Purposefully plain sans-serif; prioritizes legibility, balances display face expressiveness.  
- Usage: Body copy, navigation, buttons, captions, data.  
- Free equivalents: "Inter", "Söhne"-style, or "Work Sans" — clean, neutral, geometric-humanist sans.  


### Spacing, Border Radius, Shadows, Badges, Inputs, Button Styles, Card Styles  
No explicit values provided in the visible content.
